candidates.name: Josh Green
candidates.notes: 9th Governor of Hawaii (2022-). Emergency room physician. Born in Kingston, NY to Jewish family. Strong progressive record. Signed gun control measures. Supports abortion access. Expanded Medicaid.

profile.education: Swarthmore College (BA, Biology & Anthropology); Penn State Hershey Medical Center (MD)
profile.background: Emergency room physician who practiced in rural Hawaii; served in Hawaii state legislature (2004-2018) and as lieutenant governor (2018-2022); became 9th governor in 2022.

candidates.name: Brian Schatz
candidates.notes: Senior Senator from Hawaii (2012-). Progressive Democrat. Jewish faith. Former Lt. Governor and state legislator. Heritage Action lifetime ~2%. NRA F. One of the most popular senators per approval ratings. Strong climate/environment focus.

profile.background: Former Hawaii Lieutenant Governor and state legislator. Former CEO of Helping Hands Hawaii nonprofit. Appointed to Senate in 2012 after Daniel Inouye's death. Climate advocate.

candidates.name: Mazie Hirono
candidates.notes: Junior Senator from Hawaii (2013-). First Buddhist senator, first Asian-born immigrant senator, first female senator from Hawaii. Born in Japan. Heritage Action lifetime ~2%. NRA F. Consistently progressive across all categories. Jodo Shinshu Buddhist.

profile.education: University of Hawaii (BA Psychology), Georgetown University Law Center (JD)
profile.background: First Asian-American woman and first Buddhist elected to U.S. Senate. Former Hawaii Lieutenant Governor and U.S. House member. Emigrated from Japan at age 7.

candidates.name: Ron Kouchi
candidates.notes: President of the Hawaii Senate — verified via https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/President_of_the_Hawaii_Senate.

candidates.name: Nadine Nakamura
candidates.notes: Speaker of the Hawaii House — verified via https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Speaker_of_the_Hawaii_House_of_Representatives.

profile.education: Brigham Young University (BA Political Science), BYU J. Reuben Clark Law School (JD)
profile.background: Constitutional lawyer and former federal prosecutor. Son of former Solicitor General Rex Lee. Clerked for Justice Samuel Alito on Third Circuit. In Senate since 2011.
